member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Authorization.PermissionPolicyProvider
member.summary: Dynamic policy provider that creates permission-based policies on demand. Handles policies with format "Permission:{resource}:{action}"

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Authorization.RequirePermissionAttribute
member.summary: Require a specific permission (resource + action) to access an endpoint. Usage: [RequirePermission("vm", "power")]

member.name: M:HyperV.CentralManagement.Controllers.ContentLibraryController.ListItems(System.Nullable{HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.ContentLibraryItemType},System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all content library items with optional filtering.

member.name: M:HyperV.CentralManagement.Controllers.ContentLibraryController.GetItem(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets details of a specific content library item.

member.summary: Uploads a new content library item.

member.summary: Updates metadata of a content library item.

member.summary: Deletes a content library item.

member.summary: Deploys a content library item to an agent host.

member.name: M:HyperV.CentralManagement.Controllers.ContentLibraryController.SyncItem(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Triggers synchronization of a content library item to all its subscribers.

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.AlertDefinition.EvaluationPeriods
member.summary: How many consecutive evaluation periods the condition must be true before firing

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.AlertDefinition.CooldownSeconds
member.summary: Cooldown in seconds before the same alert can fire again

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.AlertDefinition.ClusterId
member.summary: Optional scope: specific cluster

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.AlertDefinition.AgentHostId
member.summary: Optional scope: specific agent host

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.AlertInstance.AgentHostId
member.summary: Which agent host triggered this alert

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.AlertInstance.VmInventoryId
member.summary: Which VM triggered this alert (if VM-level metric)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.DrsConfiguration.CpuImbalanceThreshold
member.summary: CPU imbalance threshold (percent difference between most/least loaded host)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.DrsConfiguration.MemoryImbalanceThreshold
member.summary: Memory imbalance threshold

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.DrsConfiguration.EvaluationIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Evaluation interval in seconds

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.DrsConfiguration.MinBenefitPercent
member.summary: Minimum improvement (percent) required for a migration recommendation

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.DrsRecommendation.EstimatedBenefitPercent
member.summary: Estimated improvement in cluster balance (percent)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.HaConfiguration.HeartbeatIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Heartbeat interval in seconds

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.HaConfiguration.FailureThreshold
member.summary: Number of missed heartbeats before declaring host failure

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.HaConfiguration.AdmissionControl
member.summary: Enable admission control to reserve capacity for failover

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.HaConfiguration.ReservedCpuPercent
member.summary: Percent of cluster CPU to reserve for failover

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.HaConfiguration.ReservedMemoryPercent
member.summary: Percent of cluster memory to reserve for failover

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.HaVmOverride.RestartOrder
member.summary: Lower numbers restart first

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.MetricDataPoint.VmInventoryId
member.summary: Optional: VM-level metric

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.NotificationChannel.Configuration
member.summary: JSON configuration for the channel (e.g. SMTP settings, webhook URL, Slack token)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.Permission.Resource
member.summary: Resource type: vm, host, cluster, network, storage, user, audit

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.Permission.Action
member.summary: Action: read, create, update, delete, power, migrate, snapshot

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.UserAccount.Role
member.summary: Legacy role field kept for backward compatibility during migration

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.UserRole.ClusterId
member.summary: Optional scope: restrict role to a specific cluster

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.UserRole.AgentHostId
member.summary: Optional scope: restrict role to a specific agent host

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory
member.summary: Represents a VM in the central inventory (cached from agents)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.AgentHostId
member.summary: Reference to the agent host that owns this VM

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.VmId
member.summary: Original VM ID from the agent

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.Name
member.summary: VM name

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.State
member.summary: Current state (Running, Off, Paused, Saved, etc.)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.CpuCount
member.summary: Number of virtual CPUs

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.MemoryMB
member.summary: Assigned memory in MB

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.Environment
member.summary: VM source environment (HCS or WMI)

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.LastSyncUtc
member.summary: Last time this VM was synced from the agent

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.FolderId
member.summary: Optional folder for organization

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.Tags
member.summary: Comma-separated tags for categorization

member.name: P:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmInventory.Notes
member.summary: Additional notes or description

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Models.VmFolder
member.summary: Folder for organizing VMs hierarchically

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.AlertEvaluationService
member.summary: Background service that periodically evaluates alert definitions against agent metrics

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.DashboardData
member.summary: DTO matching the MetricsController dashboard endpoint response

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.DatabaseHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check for database connectivity

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.LdapHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check for LDAP connectivity (if enabled)

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.DrsEngine
member.summary: Background service that evaluates cluster balance and creates migration recommendations

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.HaEngine
member.summary: Background service that monitors host health and restarts VMs on failed hosts

member.name: M:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.JwtTokenService.CreateToken(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Legacy method - creates token with simple role string

member.summary: Creates token with userId, roles, and embedded permission claims

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.MetricsCollectionService
member.summary: Background service that polls agents for metrics and stores historical data in PostgreSQL

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.MetricsRetentionService
member.summary: Background service that cleans up old metric data points (default: 30 days retention)

member.summary: Pre-check migration feasibility

member.summary: Get migration history for a VM

member.summary: Cancel a pending/running migration

member.summary: Check if a user has a specific permission, optionally scoped to a cluster or agent

member.summary: Get all permissions for a user (aggregated from all roles)

member.summary: Get all role names for a user

member.name: T:HyperV.CentralManagement.Services.SignalRClientService
member.summary: Manages a SignalR HubConnection to /hubs/vmanager for Blazor components. Scoped service — each circuit gets its own connection.
